description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a dark, matte finish and a prominent barrel extending from the main body. The receiver is robust and angular, with a visible detachable magazine inserted below the action. The grip is ergonomic and textured, designed for secure handling, and a secondary forward grip is present for added stability. The rifle lacks a traditional stock, instead featuring a pistol grip configuration, making it more maneuverable in close-quarters urban environments. The barrel is long and slender, with no visible muzzle device attached. The sighting system appears minimal or absent, emphasizing a streamlined, utilitarian build.
description: A compact, tactical rifle with a long barrel, detachable magazine, and pistol grip, finished in dark matte tones. It is designed for maneuverability and close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the grips.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the barrel, the detachable magazine, and both grips.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the receiver and the pistol grip, with the barrel extending forward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, both grips, and the uninterrupted barrel.
